title: Trackpad
drDigitalIntro:
The trackpad is the flat rectangle below your keyboard.
• It's your laptop's built-in mouse.
• It moves the little arrow on screen, called the cursor.
• You use it to point at things and click them.
drDigitalSuccess: That's the trackpad! You'll be using it constantly, so we'll spend a whole lesson practicing it soon.
drDigitalHint: Take a moment to find your own trackpad, then click Continue when you're ready.
